title.en: Medical electrical equipment — Part 1: General requirements for basic safety and essential performance

scope.en: Electrical safety requirements for medical electrical equipment

standards.abstract: Applies to the basic safety and essential performance of medical electrical equipment. Specifies general requirements and serves as the basis for particular standards.
